triggerCondition: Critical white screen issue with React compilation errors

failureMode.rootCause: Missing CardDescription export in UI component library

solution.approach: Add missing export to card.tsx component

changes.details: Added TypeScript interface for CardDescription component props
Created and exported CardDescription React component with proper styling

solution.testingApproach: Direct validation via build and runtime testing

neuralTrainingData.pattern: React component library export missing causing compilation failure
neuralTrainingData.preventionStrategy: Implement export validation in CI/CD pipeline

tddPatterns: Create unit tests for UI component library exports
recommendations.preventionStrategy: Add linting rule to detect missing exports
recommendations.trainingImpact: Pattern added to React compilation failure database
